name: Tomato Bank, Ltd.
summary: Tomato Bank, Ltd. provides banking products and services for individual and corporate customers in Japan. It accepts saving, time, reserve, foreign currency, and education fund deposits, as well as provides loan products, such as card, housing, car, education, and other loans. The company also offers debit and credit cards; insurance products and services; mutual funds and government bonds; and private placements and guarantees. In addition, it provides pension, investment trust, electronic money charge, foreign currency delivery, payment and transfer, safe deposit box, securities, and Internet and mobile banking services. Further, the company provides management consulting, business support, fund management, and ATM services. It operates through 61 branches. The company was formerly known as Sanyo Mutual Bank, Ltd. and changed its name to Tomato Bank, Ltd. in April 1989. Tomato Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.
